build.description: Primary coding agent for snipx development (Tauri + React)

planner.description: Expert planning specialist for complex features and refactoring in snipx

architect.description: Software architecture specialist for snipx system design

rust-reviewer.description: Expert Rust code reviewer for snipx Tauri backend — ownership, lifetimes, concurrency, safety

rust-build-resolver.description: Rust build, Cargo, and compilation error fixer for snipx Tauri backend

code-reviewer.description: General code review specialist for snipx — quality, maintainability, patterns

build-error-resolver.description: Build and TypeScript error resolution for snipx frontend

security-reviewer.description: Security vulnerability detection for snipx — macOS permissions, input handling, data safety

tdd-guide.description: Test-Driven Development specialist for snipx — write tests first, 80%+ coverage

plan.description: Create a detailed implementation plan for snipx features
plan.template: Create a detailed implementation plan for: $ARGUMENTS. Break into phases with risks, dependencies, and complexity.

code-review.description: Review snipx code for quality, security, and maintainability
code-review.template: Review the recent code changes in snipx for quality, security, and maintainability: $ARGUMENTS

rust-review.description: Review Rust/Tauri backend code in snipx
rust-review.template: Review the Rust backend changes in snipx: $ARGUMENTS

build-fix.description: Fix build and compilation errors in snipx

rust-build-fix.description: Fix Rust/Cargo build errors in snipx

security.description: Run security review on snipx (macOS permissions, data handling)

tdd.description: Enforce TDD workflow for snipx development

verify.description: Run verification loop — build, lint, test
verify.template: Run verification: cargo check && cargo clippy && npm run typecheck. Report all issues found.
